# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No review findings were identified in the current patch: `git diff` shows only run/journal metadata updates, with no behavior-changing edits in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/review_classification.rs` or `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`, so there are no actionable correctness, safety, robustness, or maintainability regressions to report.

## Amendments

None.
